---
title: "Atomistic Insight into Ion Transport and Conductivity in Ga/Al-Substituted Li7La3Zr2O12 Solid Electrolytes"
author: ["Fabián A. García Daza", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Anna Llordés", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2019-12-02
publication: "ACS applied materials & interfaces, **11**, 753-765 (2019)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/acsami.8b17217
url_preprint:
journ: "ACS applied materials & interfaces"
issue: 11
page: 753-765
year: 2019
image: featured.png
pub_number: 3

---
